text-unit.Formula:
(1) minimize 𝑤 𝑓 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑅 ( 𝑤 + 6 𝑥 ) subject to 𝑔 ( 𝑤 ) = 0 , 𝑛 ( 𝑤 ) = 6 , 𝐿 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑟 ( 𝑥 ) = 𝐾 𝑤 + 𝑝 , ℎ ( 𝑥 ) = 0 .
\begin {equation}\label {eq:Example1} \begin {alignedat}{5} \bodyobj {w}{f(w)+ R(w+6x)}{minimize}{} \BODY \end {alignedat}\end {equation}
minimizewf(w) +R(w + 6x)subject tog(w) = 0,n(w) = 6,L(w) +r(x) =Kw +p,h(x) = 0.
(1)

(2a) minimize 𝑤 𝑓 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑅 ( 𝑤 + 6 𝑥 ) (2b) subject to 𝑔 ( 𝑤 ) = 0 , (2c) 𝑛 ( 𝑤 ) = 6 , (2d) 𝐿 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑟 ( 𝑥 ) = 𝐾 𝑤 + 𝑝 , (2e) ℎ ( 𝑥 ) = 0 .
\begin {alignat}{5} \bodyobj {w}{f(w)+ R(w+6x) \label {eq:ObjectiveExample1}}{minimize}{} \BODY \end {alignat}
minimizewf(w) +R(w + 6x)
(2a)
subject tog(w) = 0,
(2b)
n(w) = 6,
(2c)
L(w) +r(x) =Kw +p,
(2d)
h(x) = 0.
(2e)

(3) 𝐽 ( 𝑤 ∗ ) = minimize 𝑤 𝑓 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑅 ( 𝑤 + 6 𝑥 ) subject to 𝑔 ( 𝑤 ) = 0 , 𝑛 ( 𝑤 ) = 6 , 𝐿 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑟 ( 𝑥 ) = 𝐾 𝑤 + 𝑝 , ℎ ( 𝑥 ) = 0 .
\begin {equation}\label {eq:Example12} \begin {alignedat}{5} \bodyobj {w}{f(w)+ R(w+6x)}{minimize}{J(w^*)=} \BODY \end {alignedat}\end {equation}
J(w∗) = minimizewf(w) +R(w + 6x)subject tog(w) = 0,n(w) = 6,L(w) +r(x) =Kw +p,h(x) = 0.
(3)

(4) min 𝑤 𝑓 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑅 ( 𝑤 + 6 𝑥 ) s . t . 𝑔 ( 𝑤 ) = 0 , 𝑛 ( 𝑤 ) = 6 , 𝐿 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑟 ( 𝑥 ) = 𝐾 𝑤 + 𝑝 , ℎ ( 𝑥 ) = 0 .
\begin {equation}\label {eq:Example13} \begin {alignedat}{5} \bodyobj {w}{f(w)+ R(w+6x)}{min}{} \BODY \end {alignedat}\end {equation}
minwf(w) +R(w + 6x)s.t.g(w) = 0,n(w) = 6,L(w) +r(x) =Kw +p,h(x) = 0.
(4)

(5) minimize 𝑤 𝑓 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑅 ( 𝑤 + 6 𝑥 ) subject to 𝑔 ( 𝑤 ) = 0 , 𝑛 ( 𝑤 ) = 6 , 𝐿 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑟 ( 𝑥 ) = 𝐾 𝑤 + 𝑝 , ℎ ( 𝑥 ) = 0 .
\begin {equation}\label {eq:Example14} \begin {alignedat}{5} \bodyobj {w}{f(w)+ R(w+6x)}{minimize}{} \BODY \end {alignedat}\end {equation}
minimizewf(w) +R(w + 6x)subject tog(w) = 0,n(w) = 6,L(w) +r(x) =Kw +p,h(x) = 0.
(5)

(6) minimize 𝑤 𝑓 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑅 ( 𝑤 + 6 𝑥 ) subject to 𝑔 ( 𝑤 ) = 0 , 𝑛 ( 𝑤 ) = 6 , 𝐿 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑟 ( 𝑥 ) = 𝐾 𝑤 + 𝑝 , ℎ ( 𝑥 ) = 0 .
\begin {equation}\label {eq:Example15} \begin {alignedat}{5} \bodyobj {w}{f(w)+ R(w+6x)}{minimize}{} \BODY \end {alignedat}\end {equation}
minimizewf(w) +R(w + 6x)subject tog(w) = 0,n(w) = 6,L(w) +r(x) =Kw +p,h(x) = 0.
(6)

(7) minimize 𝑤 𝑓 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑅 ( 𝑤 + 6 𝑥 ) subject to 𝑔 ( 𝑤 ) = 0 , 𝑛 ( 𝑤 ) = 6 , 𝐿 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑟 ( 𝑥 ) = 𝐾 𝑤 + 𝑝 , ℎ ( 𝑥 ) = 0 .
\begin {equation}\label {eq:Example16} \begin {alignedat}{5} \bodyobj {w}{f(w)+ R(w+6x)}{minimize}{} \BODY \end {alignedat}\end {equation}
minimizewf(w) +R(w + 6x)subject tog(w) = 0,n(w) = 6,L(w) +r(x) =Kw +p,h(x) = 0.
(7)

(8) 𝑤 ∗ = arg min 𝑤 𝑓 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑅 ( 𝑤 + 6 𝑥 ) subject to 𝑔 ( 𝑤 ) = 0 , 𝑛 ( 𝑤 ) = 6 , 𝐿 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑟 ( 𝑥 ) = 𝐾 𝑤 + 𝑝 , ℎ ( 𝑥 ) = 0 .
\begin {equation}\label {eq:Example17} \begin {alignedat}{5} \bodyobj {w}{f(w)+ R(w+6x)}{arg~min}{w^*=} \BODY \end {alignedat}\end {equation}
w∗= arg minwf(w) +R(w + 6x)subject tog(w) = 0,n(w) = 6,L(w) +r(x) =Kw +p,h(x) = 0.
(8)

minimize 𝑤 𝑓 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑅 ( 𝑤 + 6 𝑥 ) subject to 𝑔 ( 𝑤 ) = 0 , 𝑛 ( 𝑤 ) = 6 , , 𝐿 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑟 ( 𝑥 ) = 𝐾 𝑤 + 𝑝 , ℎ ( 𝑥 ) = 0 .
\begin {alignat*}{5} \bodyobj {w}{f(w)+ R(w+6x)}{minimize}{} \BODY \end {alignat*}
minimizewf(w) +R(w + 6x)subject tog(w) = 0,p(w) = 0,q(w) = 0, r(w) = 0,
(9)
n(w) = 6,L(w) +r(x) =Kw +p,h(x) = 0.

(10a) 𝑤 ∗ = min 𝑤 𝑓 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑅 ( 𝑤 + 6 𝑥 ) (10b) s . t . 𝑔 ( 𝑤 ) = 0 , (10c) 𝑛 ( 𝑤 ) = 6 , (10d) 𝐿 ( 𝑤 ) + 𝑟 ( 𝑥 ) = 𝐾 𝑤 + 𝑝 , (10e) ℎ ( 𝑥 ) = 0 .
\begin {alignat}{5} \bodyobj {w}{f(w)+ R(w+6x)\label {eq:ObjectiveExample3}}{min}{w^*=} \BODY \end {alignat}
w∗= minwf(w) +R(w + 6x)
(10a)
s.t.g(w) = 0,
(10b)
n(w) = 6,
(10c)
L(w) +r(x) =Kw +p,
(10d)
h(x) = 0.
(10e)
